scripts.build:cpp-native:
if not exist server in mkdir server in && g++ cpp
ative\dijkstra.cpp -O2 -std=c++11 -o server in
ative_dijkstra.exe && g++ cpp
ative\knapsack.cpp -O2 -std=c++11 -o server in
ative_knapsack.exe && g++ cpp
ative\sorting.cpp -O2 -std=c++11 -o server in
ative_sorting.exe && g++ cpp
ative\priority.cpp -O2 -std=c++11 -o server in
ative_priority.exe && g++ cpp
ative\ward_knapsack.cpp -O2 -std=c++11 -o server in
ative_ward_knapsack.exe
